mapper.sql: n.id, n.course_id, n.title, n.content, n.type, n.status, n.publish_time, n.create_time, n.update_time, n.create_by, n.update_by, n.deleted
mapper.select: SELECT , c.name AS course_name, NULL AS read_flag FROM edu_notice n LEFT JOIN edu_course c ON c.id = n.course_id AND c.deleted = 0 WHERE n.id = #{id} AND n.deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO edu_notice (course_id, title, content, type, status, publish_time, create_time, update_time, create_by, update_by) VALUES (#{courseId}, #{title}, #{content}, #{type}, #{status}, CASE WHEN #{status} = 1 THEN NOW() ELSE NULL END, NOW(), NOW(), #{createBy}, #{updateBy})
mapper.update: UPDATE edu_notice SET course_id = #{courseId}, title = #{title}, content = #{content}, type = #{type}, status = #{status}, publish_time = CASE WHEN #{status} = 1 AND publish_time IS NULL THEN NOW() ELSE publish_time END, update_time = NOW(), update_by = #{updateBy} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE edu_notice SET deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO edu_notice_read (notice_id, student_id, read_time) VALUES (#{noticeId}, #{studentId}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT sgm.student_id) FROM edu_student_group_member sgm JOIN edu_student_group_course sgc ON sgc.group_id = sgm.group_id WHERE sgc.course_id = #{courseId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM edu_notice_read WHERE notice_id = #{noticeId}
